title: Curaleaf Bolsters Florida Footprint with Two New Medical Dispensaries
text: Curaleaf announced the opening of two new medical dispensaries in Jacksonville Beach and Fernandina Beach, Florida, continuing its strategic expansion in the state. These openings bring Curaleaf's Florida retail footprint to an even stronger position in one of the company's most important markets. Florida remains one of Curaleaf's largest and most strategically important retail markets, with 72 retail locations statewide. The expansion demonstrates Curaleaf's commitment to maintaining market share and capturing growth opportunities in Florida's regulated cannabis market. Previous expansion announcements included dispensaries in Port St. Lucie, Pensacola, and Miami, showcasing the company's focus on deepening its retail presence in key markets. The company has been strategic in its expansion, focusing on high-potential markets where it can leverage existing operational infrastructure and brand recognition.
